title: Enhance NeonButton Component for Touch-Friendly Sizing and Contrast
description: Update NeonButton component to use new design system variables for improved visibility and touch accessibility. Increase minimum button size to 48x48px, add thicker borders, and enhance visual contrast.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace px-6 py-3 with new CSS variables (--button-padding-x, --button-padding-y)
Higher contrast between button states (default, hover, active, disabled)
Neon glow effect is more prominent and visible
All color variants (cyan, magenta, purple) have enhanced visibility
Ripple effect still works correctly with new sizing
All existing props work as before
technicalNotes: Update className string to use new CSS variables
Enhance neon-border-* classes in effects.css if needed
Test on mobile devices for touch target size
Ensure accessible color contrast ratios (WCAG AA minimum)
Maintain existing animation and transition behaviors
testingStrategy: Unit tests: verify all props work correctly. Visual tests: verify sizing on mobile and desktop. Accessibility tests: verify touch targets and color contrast.
rollbackPlan: Revert to previous className values if sizing breaks layouts
